caveats: inputs.ai_replaceable_share: Fractions are task potential, not a forecast of layoffs or billable-hour reduction.
inputs.ai_replaceable_share: 4-digit role mix includes sibling-code contamination.
inputs.pi_dist: Practice-area fee mix is decisive and not observed for the target band.
inputs.pi_moat: Model Rule restrictions protect independence, not necessarily economic moat.
inputs.t50_years: Reported usage is not necessarily embedded, verified firm workflow.
inputs.current_adoption_pct: Global legal-professional survey; not exclusively US lower-middle-market law offices.
inputs.historical_analogs: No quantified historical legal-tech time series selected.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct: Not an observed ownership statistic; lawyers are not the same as owners of $1-10M EBITDA firms.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct.succession_shortage_documented: Avoids inferring shortage from general lawyer demographics.
inputs.active_consolidators: This is an investability proxy, not a count of law firms or ABS licenses.
inputs.buy_mult: BizBuySell's cited sales are predominantly far below the target EBITDA band and owner earnings differ from EBITDA.
inputs.exit_mult: No directly comparable $1-10M law-office exit transactions were reopened.
inputs.pricing_structure: Target-specific billing mix must be diligenced.

q.rationale: The existing v3 distribution-retention × moat-retention judgment is reused as a bounded Stage 1 commercial-retention proxy.

leaves.rationale: Predeclared bounded demand/operator row for the inherited v3 terminal class; unknown classes remain missing.

e.rationale: Global eligible-union share; heterogeneous records use the predeclared wider/lower class-count row.

n.detail: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $330,420 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541110); class <5: 116,668 firms, avg revenue/firm $419,995 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $65,729 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 22,518 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,416,234 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $221,641 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 10,001 firms, avg revenue/firm $3,187,546 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $498,851 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 6,245 firms, avg revenue/firm $10,168,102 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,591,308 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 948 firms, avg revenue/firm $58,651,846 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $9,179,014 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 203 firms, avg revenue/firm $612,665,074 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $95,882,084 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 7,193

s5.rationale: Fixed transform of the disclosed v3 owner-age range into five-year qualifying control-transfer propensity.

a.rationale: AI evidence supports material automation of written, research, review and administrative tasks, while professional judgment and representation keep lawyer automation partial.

l.detail: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 541110 ($150,269,970,536) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 541110 ($356,242,120,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

rho.rationale: Fixed outcome-blind transform of the v3 t50 adoption estimate, widened by the declared bridge error.

source_review.summary: All deterministic mechanics and frozen digests pass, and all six registered sources are live. The useful kill thesis is supported by observed legal GenAI adoption, documented workflow exposure, and binding ownership constraints. Publication requires the authored caveats because owner demographics, target-band transaction multiples, consolidator count, practice mix, and several economic selections rely on disclosed broad proxies or estimates; none is an inaccessible or contradicted score-driving claim that warrants rejection.
